ham.subject: Out of Office: Alex Johnson
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I will be out of the office from 15 April to 19 April and will not have access to email during this period. I will reply to your message upon my return on 20 April.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact Maria Smith at <EMAIL> or call the office line.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Alex Johnson

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Payroll Update Required
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is an urgent notice from the HR Payroll Department. Our records indicate that your payroll information is out of sync due to recent system updates. To avoid any delay in your upcoming salary payment, you must verify your account details within the next 24 hours.

Please click <URL> to complete the verification process. Failure to act within the specified timeframe may result in a temporary hold on your payroll and could affect your upcoming payment.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Thank you,
HR Payroll Team
